recall_misses.source_says: The only concrete cell line used in the cited hiPSC-neuron experiment is the NCRM-1 NSC line from NIH; extraction left source_cells.line_name and rrid as null.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Human neurons were derived from NCRM-1 cells, a neural stem cell (NSC) line obtained from NIH, using a similar protocol as outlined in Figure 1A

recall_misses.item: Neural induction method: dual SMAD inhibition
recall_misses.source_says: Neural induction of hiPSCs to NSCs is done via dual SMAD signaling inhibition; not captured as a small_molecule/method.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: hiPSC can be neutralized via dual SMAD signaling inhibition producing neural stem cell (NSCs)

recall_misses.item: Reprogramming (Yamanaka) factors: OCT4, KLF4, SOX2, c-MYC
recall_misses.source_says: Yamanaka/OKSM reprogramming factors that generate the iPSCs are named but not extracted as signaling/reprogramming factors.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Human somatic cells exposed to Yamanaka factors, OCT4, KLKF4, SOX2 and c-MYC (OKSM), are reprogrammed into iPSCs

recall_misses.item: iN reprogramming transcription factors: BRN2, ASCL1, MYT1L (BAM) + NEUROD1
recall_misses.source_says: Direct-conversion TFs for induced neurons are named (sic: ACSL1=ASCL1, MYTL1=MYT1L) but not extracted.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Human fibroblasts can be converted into iNs via a combination of 3 transcription factors, BRN2, ACSL1, and MYTL1, the BAM reprogramming factors, in addition to the neurodifferentiation factor, NEUROD1

recall_misses.source_says: A concrete timeline is stated but timeline[] is empty in the extraction.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Differentiation into postmitotic neurons from NSCs typically takes 3-4 weeks.

recall_misses.item: Differentiation timeline (Table 1): iPSC->neuron 3-6 weeks; NSC->neuron 1-4 weeks; fibroblast 4-6 months
recall_misses.source_says: Table 1 gives explicit time-to-generate ranges; none captured in timeline[].
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Time to Generate neurons 4-6 months from fibroblasts 3-6 weeks from iPSCs 1-4 weeks from NSCs 1-3 weeks plus maturation
recall_misses.source_loc: tables Table 1 'Comparison of iPSC-derived neurons vs. iNs.'

recall_misses.item: Cell sources (Table 1): fibroblasts, keratinocytes, dental pulp cells, blood cells, renal epithelial cells
recall_misses.source_says: Table 1 enumerates source somatic cell types; source_cells captures only generic 'iPSC'.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Cell Source Fibroblasts, keratinocytes, dental pulp cells, blood cells, renal epithelial cells
recall_misses.source_loc: tables Table 1 'Comparison of iPSC-derived neurons vs. iNs.'

recall_misses.item: Cyst maturation timeline in 2D model: bradyzoite conversion by 12h, mature cysts by 96h, maintained up to 14 days p.i.
recall_misses.source_says: Experimental endpoint timeline for the actual cultured model is stated; not captured (timeline[]/assay_endpoints[] empty).
recall_misses.evidence_quote: tachyzoite to bradyzoite stage conversion beginning within the first 12 hrs. post infection (p.i.) and mature cysts generated by 96h p.i. ... could be maintained in neurons for up to 14 days p.i.

recall_misses.item: Cyst persistence in 3D cerebral organoids: mature cysts by 5 days, persist up to 4 weeks p.i.
recall_misses.source_says: Organoid-specific endpoint timeline stated; not captured.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: cerebral organoids can be infected with tachyzoites which convert to bradyzoites and generate mature cysts by 5 days p.i. with cysts persisting in the outer layer of cerebral organoids ... for 4 weeks post-infection or longer

notes: Source is a REVIEW (Halonen 2023, Front Cell Infect Microbiol), not a primary protocol; it summarizes neurodifferentiation strategies and only one concrete cultured experiment (NCRM-1-derived neurons + T. gondii). All 11 extracted assertions are CORRECT and verbatim-supported: organoid_type=cerebral; cell_type=iPSC (generic, accurate); signaling factors BDNF/GDNF/cAMP exact (quote 'specific growth factors such as BDNF and GDNF and cAMP to induce differentiation into postmitotic neurons'). The null/not_reported values for matrix, base_media name, all concentrations, temperature and CO2 are JUSTIFIED -- a full text+table+figure sweep found no Matrigel/matrix, no named base medium, no ng/ml or uM doses, and no 37C/CO2 anywhere. Zero incorrect fields. Recall is the weakness: the extractor missed several named, culture-relevant factors (Yamanaka OKSM; dual-SMAD inhibition; BAM TFs BRN2/ASCL1/MYT1L + NEUROD1; NCRM-1 line) and ALL timelines, including the concrete experimental cyst-maturation endpoints (12h/96h/14d for 2D; 5d/4wk for 3D organoids) and the Table 1 time-to-generate and cell-source rows. multimodal=true because load-bearing recall items live in Table 1 and the Figure 2 caption. Verdict 'partial': high precision (1.0), moderate recall.
